_comment: Canonical sampling profiles for chat + agent decision decodes. Hand-ported into Swift GenerationOptions / Android LlamaEngine / TS node-llama-cpp. CI can grow a parity check later; this file is the source of truth for defaults so Android cannot regress top_k / rep-penalty / no-think again.

agent_decision._note: Qwen3 non-thinking recipe; grammar-constrained on all three platforms

agent_deliberation._note: Unconstrained think-then-decide pass; hard-capped so it cannot starve the decision
